commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a documented `agent:turn:save` internal hook for ACP save outcomes, wires ACP manager/direct-command/dispatch save callbacks, and updates transcript persistence tests.

PR surface: Source +278, Tests +798, Docs +3. Total +1079 across 17 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction: this is a feature PR, and current main lacks the `agent:turn:save` surface. Source review confirms the PR adds the proposed hook path, but real behavior proof is still missing.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed; the remaining action is contributor real behavior proof and maintainer acceptance of the new hook API.

target.title: feat(hooks): add ACP turn save outcome hook
target.body:
## Summary

Adds a separate `agent:turn:save` internal hook event that reports the ACP turn save phase outcome. This split is intentionally based directly on `main` and does not include the `agent:turn:end` lifecycle hook from sibling PR #89152.

## Changes
- Adds `agent:turn:save` event typing, validation, and documentation with explicit `saved`, `skipped`, and `failed` outcomes.
- Awaits the existing transcript/session save work before reporting `saveOutcome: saved`; missing callbacks, declined boundaries, missing durable-write evidence, and save failures become explicit non-saved outcomes.
- Wires both chat dispatch ACP turns and direct ACP command turns through the manager save callback so durable-write evidence is observed before the hook event.
- Adds focused tests for manager outcomes, dispatch transcript persistence, direct ACP transcript persistence, invalid callback results, skipped outcomes, and failed runtime turns.

## Real behavior proof

- Behavior or issue addressed: confirms the save-outcome split branch contains the write-safe `agent:turn:save` hook and no `agent:turn:end` lifecycle hook surface.
- Real environment tested: local OpenClaw source checkout on macOS at `/Users/mantis/Projects/openclaw-pr-turn-save`, branch `feat/agent-turn-save-outcome-hook`, head `065b65af80`.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: inspected the live checkout with `rg`, then ran focused ACP save-path tests and full test typecheck from the same branch.
- Evidence after fix (terminal capture):
```text
$ git rev-parse --short HEAD
065b65af80
$ rg -n "agent:turn:end|AgentTurnEnd|onBeforeTurnEndHook|turn:end" docs/automation/hooks.md src/acp/control-plane src/hooks src/auto-reply src/agents src/commands
<no output; exit 1>
$ rg -n "agent:turn:save|onBeforeTurnSaveHook|saveOutcome" docs/automation/hooks.md src/acp/control-plane/manager.core.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-acp.ts src/agents/agent-command.ts
docs/automation/hooks.md:58:| `agent:turn:save`        | After an ACP agent turn save phase reaches an outcome      |
docs/automation/hooks.md:139:**Agent turn save events** (`agent:turn:save`): `context.sessionKey`, `context.success`, `context.saveOutcome`, `context.turnSuccess`, `context.durationMs`, optional `context.turnErrorCode`, optional `context.saveError`, and optional `context.saveSkipReason`.
src/acp/control-plane/manager.core.ts:323:              beforeSaveHook: input.onBeforeTurnSaveHook,
src/acp/control-plane/manager.core.ts:519:      "agent:turn:save internal hook failed",
src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-acp.ts:591:      onBeforeTurnSaveHook: async (completion) => {
src/agents/agent-command.ts:1050:          onBeforeTurnSaveHook: async (completion) => {
$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/acp/control-plane/manager.test.ts src/hooks/internal-hooks.test.ts src/agents/command/attempt-execution.cli.test.ts src/commands/agent.acp.test.ts src/commands/agent.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-acp.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts src/agents/agent-command.live-model-switch.test.ts
[test] passed 5 Vitest shards in 32.44s
$ pnpm check:test-types
<exit 0>
```
- Observed result after fix: the branch has save outcome wiring in both chat dispatch and direct ACP command paths, has no lifecycle-end symbols, focused save-path tests pass, and the branch typechecks.
- What was not tested: a full live ACP backend session on a production user account was not run from this branch.
- Proof limitations or environment constraints: the proof is from a local source checkout; the hook is internal and requires an installed hook handler to observe at runtime.

## Testing
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/acp/control-plane/manager.test.ts src/hooks/internal-hooks.test.ts src/agents/command/attempt-execution.cli.test.ts src/commands/agent.acp.test.ts src/commands/agent.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-acp.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts src/agents/agent-command.live-model-switch.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxlint src/acp/control-plane/manager.core.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.types.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.test.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.turn-runner.ts src/hooks/internal-hooks.ts src/hooks/internal-hooks.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-acp.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-acp.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-acp-transcript.runtime.ts src/agents/agent-command.ts src/agents/agent-command.live-model-switch.test.ts src/agents/command/attempt-execution.ts src/agents/command/attempt-execution.cli.test.ts src/commands/agent.acp.test.ts src/commands/agent.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 docs/automation/hooks.md src/acp/control-plane/manager.core.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.types.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.test.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.turn-runner.ts src/hooks/internal-hooks.ts src/hooks/internal-hooks.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-acp.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-acp.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-acp-transcript.runtime.ts src/agents/agent-command.ts src/agents/agent-command.live-model-switch.test.ts src/agents/command/attempt-execution.ts src/agents/command/attempt-execution.cli.test.ts src/commands/agent.acp.test.ts src/commands/agent.test.ts`
- `pnpm check:test-types`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD && git diff --check`

## Related
Related #37833
Sibling to #89152
Split from #71399
